sources.title: State of Nevada Board of Wildlife Commissioners — Fishing Seasons CR 25-16 (Jan 1, 2026 – Dec 31, 2027)
sources.quotedText: Washoe County Community Fishing Ponds: Battle Born Pond, Davis Creek Pond, Idlewild Ponds, Marilyn's Pond, Paradise Ponds, Rancho San Rafael Pond, Sparks Marina Pond, Verdi Pond, Virginia Lake and Wilson Common. Open year around. Daily: 3 game fish. Possession: 6 game fish. Hours parks are open to public use.

sources.title: Virginia Lake — Nevada Department of Wildlife
sources.quotedText: Virginia Lake is 12 feet deep when full and covers 24.5 surface acres. The game fish stocked routinely in the lake include rainbow trout, brown trout, and bowcutt trout (rainbow x cutthroat hybrid). Channel catfish, largemouth bass, and black crappie also exist, and if you like to fish for carp, this lake has some big ones. The state record carp came from Virginia Lake in 2020. Stocking Updates: 999 Rainbow Trout, 9.2 in, 10-14-2025; 955 Rainbow Trout, 10.4 in, 10-21-2024; 1031 Rainbow Trout, 10.5 in, 06-04-2024; 930 Cuttbow, 9.6 in, 10-02-2023; 1022 Rainbow Trout, 9.5 in, 10-02-2023; 995 Rainbow Trout, 9 in, 06-08-2023; 800 Channel Catfish, 4.5 in, 06-07-2023.

sources.title: Apply & Buy — Nevada Fishing Licenses — NDOW
sources.quotedText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Washoe County Community Fishing Ponds
regulations.humanSummary: Virginia Lake is open to fishing year-round.

parameters.counting_rule: No species-specific sub-limit (e.g. for black bass or catfish) is stated for Virginia Lake in NDOW's current regulation table; the limit applies to the combined daily/possession total across all game fish species.

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Washoe County Community Fishing Ponds (incl. Virginia Lake)
regulations.humanSummary: Daily limit 3 game fish; possession limit 6 game fish (all species combined) at Virginia Lake.
regulations.verbatimText: Daily: 3 game fish. Possession: 6 game fish.

parameters.note: NDOW's commission-regulation table lists hours for Washoe County Community Fishing Ponds generically as 'hours parks are open to public use'; no fixed clock times or sunrise/sunset offsets are specified for Virginia Lake (Virginia Lake Park is a City of Reno park).

regulations.citation: NBWC CR 25-16 — Washoe County Community Fishing Ponds
regulations.humanSummary: Fishing at Virginia Lake is allowed during the hours the park is open to the public.
regulations.verbatimText: Hours parks are open to public use

parameters.note: Standard Nevada resident/nonresident fishing license required for anglers 12 and older; no water-specific permit exists for Virginia Lake.

regulations.humanSummary: A Nevada fishing license is required for anglers age 12 and older at Virginia Lake; no license is required under age 12.
regulations.verbatimText: Anyone 12 years of age or older is required to have a fishing license in their possession while in the field.
